TrGatewayConfigurations.BCConfigurations:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.bcdk.BCDKConfigurationInfo"> 
  <void property="JCAAdapterConfig"> 
   <string><?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<ESBAdapterConfigurations>
    <ConnectionLess>true</ConnectionLess>
    <isConfigurationRequired>true</isConfigurationRequired>
    <isLicensed>true</isLicensed>
    <Inbound>false</Inbound>
    <AdapterInstanceProperties><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ESBAdapterInstanceProperties"> 
  <void property="GUID"> 
   <string>FileReader</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appName"> 
   <string>THETARAY3</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="appVersion"> 
   <string>3_0</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="domain"> 
   <string>BCConfigPropertySheet</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="instanceName"> 
   <string>FileReader1</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="logCategories"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.spi.outbound.FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>FileReaderInteraction</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>FileReaderInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>FileReaderInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.cci.FileReaderInteraction</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>LOGGER_DISPLAY_NAME</string> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.LogCategory"> 
     <void property="loggerDescription"> 
      <string>LOGGER_DESCRIPTION</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerDisplayName"> 
      <string>LOGGER_DISPLAY_NAME</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerLevel"> 
      <string>SEVERE</string> 
     </void> 
     <void property="loggerName"> 
      <string>LOGGER_NAME</string> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></AdapterInstanceProperties>
    <ConfigurationObjects>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.cci.FileReaderInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1300</int> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
    <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorActionsMap"> 
     <void property="errorActionsMap"> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>2</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>1</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
        <void method="add"> 
         <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> 
          <void property="errorActionID"> 
           <int>3</int> 
          </void> 
         </object> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
      </void> 
      <void method="put"> 
       <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> 
        <void property="errorID"> 
         <int>0</int> 
        </void> 
       </object> 
       <object class="java.util.ArrayList"/> 
      </void> 
     </void> 
    </object> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorDirectory"> 
    <null/> 
   </void> 
   <void property="errorDirectoryName"> 
    <string></string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="fileName"> 
    <string>lastexecinterval.txt</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="fileReaderConfig"> 
    <void property="processPendingFilesInWork"> 
     <boolean>false</boolean> 
    </void> 
    <void property="relativeDirectory"> 
     <string>C:\Users\Susheel\Documents</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="sourceDirectory"> 
     <string>C:\Users\Susheel\Documents\New folder</string> 
    </void> 
    <void property="useWorkingDirectory"> 
     <boolean>false</boolean> 
    </void> 
    <void property="workingDirectory"> 
     <string></string> 
    </void> 
   </void> 
   <void property="guid"> 
    <string>FileReader</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="id"> 
    <string>THETARAY3__3_0__FileReader1</string> 
   </void> 
   <void property="isConfiguredNew"> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void property="targetNamespace"> 
    <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/FileReader1</string> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>File</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>Reads File contents</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>filereadercomponent.png</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.cci.FileReaderInteractionSpec</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>FileReader</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.cci.InteractionSpec</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
        <ConfigurationObject><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.cfg.ConfigurationObject"> 
  <void property="beanClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.spi.outbound.FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="beanObject"> 
   <void property="configuredVersion"> 
    <int>1100</int> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="category"> 
   <string>File</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="configParams"> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsReconnection</string> 
    <boolean>false</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>enableScheduling</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
   <void method="put"> 
    <string>supportsStudio</string> 
    <boolean>true</boolean> 
   </void> 
  </void> 
  <void property="description"> 
   <string>Read files</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="icon"> 
   <string>cf.gif</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="implClassName"> 
   <class>com.fiorano.adapter.jca.filereader.spi.outbound.FileReaderManagedConnectionFactory</class> 
  </void> 
  <void property="name"> 
   <string>FileReader</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="type"> 
   <string>javax.resource.spi.ManagedConnectionFactory</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></ConfigurationObject>
    </ConfigurationObjects>
    <InputRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Input</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot;?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/FileReader1&quot; xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Input&quot;&gt;
        &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
            &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
                &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;FileName&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;  maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot;/&gt;
		        &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Directory&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;  maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot;/&gt;
                &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;PostProcessingDirectory&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;  maxOccurs=&quot;1&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
        &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/FileReader1</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></InputRecordDefinition>
    <FaultRecordDefinition><![CDATA[<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> 
<java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> 
 <object class="fiorano.esb.record.ESBRecordDefinition"> 
  <void property="rootElementName"> 
   <string>Error</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="structure"> 
   <string>&lt;?xml version=&quot;1.0&quot; encoding=&quot;UTF-8&quot; ?&gt;
&lt;xsd:schema xmlns:xsd=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema&quot; targetNamespace=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot; xmlns:tns=&quot;http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault&quot;&gt;
    &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;Error&quot;&gt;
       &lt;xsd:complexType&gt;
          &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorCode&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorMessage&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;errorDetail&quot; type=&quot;xsd:string&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
            &lt;xsd:element name=&quot;data&quot; type=&quot;tns:data&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot;/&gt;
          &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
       &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:element&gt;
    &lt;xsd:complexType name=&quot;data&quot;&gt;
	  &lt;xsd:sequence&gt;
         &lt;xsd:any namespace=&quot;##any&quot; minOccurs=&quot;0&quot; maxOccurs=&quot;unbounded&quot; processContents=&quot;lax&quot;/&gt;
      &lt;/xsd:sequence&gt;
    &lt;/xsd:complexType&gt;
&lt;/xsd:schema&gt;</string> 
  </void> 
  <void property="targetNamespace"> 
   <string>http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/fault</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java> 
]]></FaultRecordDefinition>
</ESBAdapterConfigurations>
</string> 
  </void> 
 </object> 
</java>
TrGatewayConfigurations.ErrorConfigurations: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.ErrorConfigurationInfo"> <void property="errorActionsMap"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorActionsMap"> <void property="errorActionsMap"> <void method="put"> <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> <void property="errorID"> <int>2</int> </void> </object> <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> <void method="add"> <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.RetryErrorAction"> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>1</int> </void> </object> </void> <void method="add"> <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.ErrorAction"> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>3</int> </void> </object> </void> <void method="add"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorAction"> <void property="active"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>11</int> </void> </object> </void> <void method="add"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorAction"> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>12</int> </void> </object> </void> </object> </void> <void method="put"> <object class="fiorano.esb.adapter.jca.error.Error"> <void property="errorID"> <int>0</int> </void> </object> <object class="java.util.ArrayList"> <void method="add"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorAction"> <void property="active"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>11</int> </void> </object> </void> <void method="add"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.error.XErrorAction"> <void property="active"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> <void property="errorActionID"> <int>2</int> </void> </object> </void> </object> </void> </void> </object> </void> </object> </java>
TrGatewayConfigurations.SchedulerConfigurations: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <java version="1.8.0_202" class="java.beans.XMLDecoder"> <object class="com.fiorano.bc.trgateway.model.dmi.scheduler.SchedulerConfigurationInfo"> <void property="input"> <string><ns1:Input xmlns:ns1="http://www.fiorano.com/fesb/activity/FileReader1"> <FileName>lastexecinterval.txt</FileName> <Directory>C:\Users\Susheel\Documents\New folder</Directory> </ns1:Input> </string> </void> <void property="repeatInterval"> <int>15</int> </void> <void property="schedulingEnabled"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> <void property="startDate"> <object class="java.util.Date"> <long>1765950231000</long> </object> </void> <void property="unit"> <string>seconds</string> </void> <void property="useInputXML"> <boolean>true</boolean> </void> </object> </java>
